title: Tripe Fritters
description: A crispy and savory Uruguayan-inspired fritter dish made with tripe, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. Clean and cut the tripe into small pieces.
2. In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
3. Add the tripe to the pan and cook until browned.
4. In a bowl, mix together the sour cream, crumble, egg, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
5. Add the cooked tripe mixture to the bowl and mix well.
6. Gradually add the breadcrumbs to the mixture until it resembles a thick batter.
7. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small balls.
8. Heat about 1-2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
9. When the oil is hot, carefully place the tripe balls into the oil and fry until golden brown.
10. Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
